flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northwestern State University of Louisiana fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (7.5k → 5.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Northwestern State University of Louisiana vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.8k vs 7.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwestern State University of Louisiana fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northwestern State University of Louisiana rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (63.8% → 70.9%).
